block.name: Fix semgrep false positive — rename Latent token error log (#190)
acceptance_criteria: All three tonic_engine.py copies: 'Latent token error' renamed to 'Latent generation error'
py_compile passes on all three files
No remaining 'Latent token error' string in any tonic_engine.py

outputs.name: tonic_ng_updated
outputs.contract: log message renamed, no other changes

never: Do NOT change any logic, only rename the log message string
Do NOT touch any other file
Do NOT modify the exception variable or the logger.debug call structure
anti_drift: Three identical one-line string replacements. Nothing else.

steps.description: Confirm the target line exists in NeuroGraph tonic_engine.py before editing

params.command: python3 -c "p='/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py'; s=open(p).read(); assert 'Latent token error' in s; open(p,'w').write(s.replace('Latent token error','Latent generation error',1)); print('UPDATED')"

python3 -c "p='/home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py'; s=open(p).read(); assert 'Latent token error' in s; open(p,'w').write(s.replace('Latent token error','Latent generation error',1)); print('UPDATED')"

steps.description: Confirm no 'Latent token error' remains and all three files compile clean

params.command: python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/NeuroGraph/tonic_engine.py && python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py && python3 -m py_compile /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py && grep -rL 'Latent token error' /home/josh/NeuroGraph/tonic_engine.py /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/tonic_engine.py /home/josh/Faux_Clawdbot/neurograph_work/tonic_engine.py | wc -l | grep -q 3 && echo 'ALL CLEAN'

steps.description: All three tonic_engine.py files say 'Latent generation error'. No 'Latent token error' remains. py_compile passes all three.
